summary: The implementation closely matches the BuildRequest requirements. All six requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-6) have been implemented with appropriate components, hooks, and backend logic. The application includes Internet Identity authentication, workout tracking with complete data models, form validation, history views, progression charts, and a fitness-inspired visual theme. Minor omissions include the two requested images (hero-fitness and dumbbell-icon) which are referenced in code but not provided in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Energetic workout hero background with abstract fitness elements (hero-fitness.dim_1200x600.png)
missing_requirements.reason: Image file is referenced in Layout.tsx but not included in the added files list

missing_requirements.requirement: Minimalist dumbbell icon for workout entry section (dumbbell-icon.dim_128x128.png)
missing_requirements.reason: Image file is referenced in WorkoutEntryForm.tsx but not included in the added files list

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management system with name field and profile setup modal
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies 'All workout data must be associated with authenticated users' but does not request a user profile feature with name collection

hallucinated_features.description: Admin access control system with permission checks
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify any admin functionality or role-based access control beyond basic user authentication
